1786080.name: Exodus: Trapped In Time
1786080.description:
Exodus: Trapped in Time is a fast-paced ultraviolent old school FPS that fuses together classic shooters like Wolf3D, Doom, Blake Stone and others.
The engine (called Blast) that powers Exodus is coded specifically for the game and completely from scratch - just like in the good old days. It's modder friendly, flexible and very portable.
The engine is full of modern mechanics some of which are completely destructible environments, Newtonian physics, bullet-time slow motion effects, real-time dynamic lighting, gravity, particle systems and more.

THE STORY

In the far future, a military experiment goes wrong after attempt to stretch the time.

You are a soldier, involuntary victim of the experiment, stuck in-between the timelines and exposed to abnormal time behavior, surrounded by evil creatures from an alternative time continuum.
All the events happen in the timeframe of a split second.

You need to find your way out of this experiment.
1786080.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
